25/11/21  Update
Overall performance was better
The brightness of the light can be controlled using the black and white brightness settings shown in Figure 2.
The lighting at some angles is still out of control; this will be fixed in the next update.
Hugging Face 🤗 app
Online running link：
www.runninghub.ai/post/1990093672173719553?inviteCode=rh-v1331
YouTube tutorial:
https://youtu.be/20-7gK9Jfuk
Bilibili tutorial:
https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1h3CRB1ED7/
默认提示词：“使用图2的亮度贴图对图1重新照明(光源来自前方)”
只修改括号内的光源方向即可，例如现在的提示词是“光源来自前方”，可以修改为：
前方、左前方、左方、左后方、后方、右后方、右方、右前方、上方、下方
The default prompt message is: "Relight Figure 1 using the luminance map from Figure 2 (light source from the front)". You only need to modify the light source direction within the brackets. For example, the current prompt message is "light source from the front", which can be changed to: Front, Left Front, Left, Left Rear, Rear, Right Rear, Right, Right Front, Above, Below
For communication/cooperation, you can join the discord group to communicate：
https://discord.gg/yVAVa43mWk
